profile.belief: Holding space for listeners to fill in what you didn't say requires the hardest kind of trust.
profile.working_on: Audio drama where your own forgotten moments become the haunting, not the script.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep desire to create intimacy, inviting listeners to confront their own vulnerabilities through shared, unspoken experiences.
